project_name: Astra - AI Knowledge Assistant for Biziverse
archetype: Archetype 4 (Swiss & High-Contrast) adapted for Corporate Enterprise

layout_and_spacing.spacing_scale: Use generous spacing. Tailwind scale: p-4, p-6, p-8 for inner card paddings. p-12 or p-16 for section spacing.

grids.dashboard_admin: The 'Control Room' Grid: grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 lg:grid-cols-4. Tight gaps (gap-4 to gap-6). Use h-full on children.
grids.user_portal: The 'Bento' Grid: grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-12 gap-8. AI Chat takes col-span-8, side panels (announcements, reference) take col-span-4.

layout_and_spacing.alignment: Optical alignment over geometrical. Left-align dense content and inputs. Center hero headings only if it balances the layout.

surface_strategies.headers: Crystal Glass: bg-white/70 backdrop-blur-xl border-b border-slate-200/50. 1px delicate inner stroke.
surface_strategies.dashboard_cards: Grid Borders or Flat Solid: Flat white background, 1px subtle border (border-slate-200), NO default shadow. On hover: -translate-y-1, shadow-lg, border-slate-300.
surface_strategies.ai_chat_bubbles: User: bg-navy_dark text-white rounded-2xl rounded-tr-sm. AI: bg-secondary border border-border text-primary rounded-2xl rounded-tl-sm. Reference items: bg-white border border-border shadow-sm.

components_strategy.general: Use Shadcn UI for tables, calendars, select, dropdowns, dialogs, tabs.
components_strategy.forms: Use Shadcn Form, Input, Select. Never use native inputs without styling. Left-align labels.
components_strategy.buttons: Primary CTA: bg-[#FF6B00] text-white hover:bg-[#E66000]. Secondary: bg-white border border-slate-200 text-navy_dark hover:bg-slate-50.
components_strategy.charts: Use Recharts or Shadcn Charts for Admin Dashboard analytics. Ensure tooltips use dark navy backgrounds with white text for contrast.
components_strategy.icons: Use lucide-react (default) or @phosphor-icons/react for premium duotone look.

motion_and_interaction.hover_states: All interactive elements must explicitly change state. e.g., hover:bg-slate-50.
motion_and_interaction.transitions: Use specific transition properties. e.g., transition-all duration-200 ease-in-out.
motion_and_interaction.animations: Framer Motion for entrance. Staggered list animations for knowledge base items and chat messages.
motion_and_interaction.accessibility: Respect prefers-reduced-motion. Ensure focus states have high contrast ring (focus:ring-2 focus:ring-[#FF6B00]).

image_urls.description: Abstract white minimal architecture. Good for login page background or subtle hero background overlay.
Professional office teamwork. Good for default announcement banners or knowledge base module thumbnails.
Coworkers smiling around laptop. Good for resource thumbnails (videos/PPTs).

media.handling: Never use placeholder text URLs. Use the provided Unsplash URLs. Use gradient overlays to ensure text readability if placing text over images.

testing.attributes: All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a data-testid attribute (e.g., data-testid='login-button', data-testid='chat-submit').

instructions_to_main_agent: Strictly follow the color palette: White background, Dark Navy text/structural elements, Royal Orange for primary CTAs.
Implement the Layout rules: Bento grid for User Portal, Control Room grid for Admin Portal.
Use Shadcn UI extensively but customize the border radius and padding to feel generous and premium.
Install and use 'Outfit' and 'Manrope' fonts from Google Fonts.
Ensure the AI Chat interface looks distinct from typical chat apps by incorporating structured response areas (Explanation, Steps, Suggestions, Reference Materials).
Add 'data-testid' to all buttons, inputs, and interactive elements.
